title: Niin's Totem of Alliance
description: Adds a totem that makes ghasts ignore you when held.
body:
![Niin's Totem of Alliance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccaf36a3d73ddce2a8105be6b2a00a1027eed2d2.png)
## This is a small mod
that adds the ![A totem in the shape of a ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47b8899d3bc55e64c8d42fe9db6f71d003a8c544.png) Totem of Alliance, a new item which when held makes ghasts leave you alone.

### Always wanted to build in the nether
but couldn't because everything you build gets burned to ashes? Then this mod is for you.

### However
such an item isn't easy to find, you will really have to want it.

## Want to know how to get it?
If you want to discover how to get it by yourself, restrain yourself from reading the following spoilers:
<details>
<summary> Clue 1: </summary>
The name of the item is a good clue, if you know you know.
</details>
<details>
<summary> Clue 2: </summary>
You will need to complete a challenging advancement to get your first Totem of Alliance.
</details>
<details>
<summary> I just want to know, man: </summary>
Bring a ghast to the overworld and kill it, it will drop the totem.
</details>

### ENJOY NOT GETTING FIREBALLED TO DEATH!
![Me and my new BFF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Es3dfaDw/images/b8ba34290d56fa908581c7df53d5fbe9c2c50ac4.png)
